# Reema Sharma

Reema Sharma is Acme Corp's Chief Operating Officer and the executive who ultimately authorizes the budget for the carbon baseline engagement. She is broadly supportive — she sees credible climate reporting as a license-to-operate issue — but she balances that against CFO Victor Lin's cost concerns and expects the engagement to stay on the board timeline.

Sustainability, procurement, and facilities all roll up to Reema, which makes her the single point where the engagement's operational dependencies converge. She is persuaded primarily by Jane Okoye on substance and by Tomás Rivera on investor optics, and she is the one person who can overrule Victor when the two executives disagree.
